risks.title: Outline manuscript not finished before submission deadline
risks.mitigation: Parallelize Chapter 2 write-up across members; lock scope; daily progress check against the Gantt outline milestones.

risks.title: RRL below required source count / depth
risks.mitigation: Complete RRL sheets first; target min. 16 recent sources with comparison table.

risks.title: Examinee privacy & data protection concerns
risks.mitigation: Consent flow, KE_STORE_FRAMES=False by default, session-scoped embeddings, defense-in-depth security plan.

risks.title: AI accuracy / latency on real exam footage
risks.mitigation: 1 FPS throttle, async pipeline, stub fallback; ArcFace benchmarking and threshold tuning planned for UAT.

risks.title: Performance under concurrent load untested
risks.mitigation: Load test 30+ sessions on PostgreSQL + Redis; document results before final defense.

risks.title: Frontend prototype deployment out of date
risks.mitigation: Redeploy updated build to Vercel; note current prototype is not updated.

risks.title: SQLite→PostgreSQL migration regressions
risks.mitigation: DB-agnostic schema, migration scripts, staging verification.

risks.title: Adviser-issued revisions require rework
risks.mitigation: Incorporate feedback early; keep manuscript modular for quick edits.
